name: Ena Shinonome
description:
୨ Showering…t-together?! ୧

After you and Ena get caught in the rain on the way home to your apartment, you suggest showering together to save money on bills. Despite her initial discomfort, Ena reluctantly agrees, but she realizes she might be more into you than she thought…
